title: 教訓之二：決して撮影を諦めるな

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
My name? Well, it comes from the place I was
born. They call me Kentucky...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Quick Draw Kentucky!

text_block_list.name: Gunman Actor
text_block_list.text:
You got a mean look to ya. But in these parts,
they call me Lone Wolf Joe. And I walk a... lone...

text_block_list.name: Gunman Actor
text_block_list.text:
Argh. Sorry. Can we cut? I just can't land the
whole "lone wolf" thing. Director, could you give
me an idea of what you're looking for?

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Oh, right... What I'm lookin for is...
Uhhh... A-anyway, let's take five, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text:
How do I explain the essence of a lone wolf?
Ngh... I can see it in my head, but...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I've got a great idea!
Okay, y'all! Grab your stuff and let's go! ♪

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text: Huh? Go where?

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text:
T-Taiki! Are you listening to me?! This isn't the
time to frolic around a zoo!

text_block_list.name: Zoo Wolf
text_block_list.text: AWOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Look at the wolf howl! Isn't it much cooler seein' it
for yourself?!

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh... Um... You're right. And also, there's a
kind of sadness to it... and refinement...

text_block_list.name: Gunman Actor
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, I get it! I think I've got a good grasp on the
role now. Yeah, I know just what to do!

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text:
What?! What do you mean the backdrop is
broken?! How are we supposed to shoot the next
scene without a backdrop?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Sounds like a good chance for a construction
competition! Let's get to hammerin'! ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
All finished! Whaddya think? Will this backdown
do?

text_block_list.name: Art Staff
text_block_list.text: Haha! You mean backdrop, right? But, yeah, it's perfect! It looks like getting everyone's input really paid off!

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text:
It sure did...
A-anyway... Let's get rolling!

text_block_list.name: Construction Staff
text_block_list.text:
You guys are filming a movie?! I hate to break it
to you, but this site is scheduled for construction.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You know what that means! We're going on an
adventure! Time to go location scoutin', y'all!

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text:
An adventure... Oh! What about that park we
passed by earlier?! There was something I liked
about its atmosphere. Let's look around there!

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text:
All done for the day! Man... One thing after
another. I was starting to think we'd never finish.

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text:
But it ended up being quite a productive day!
And it's all thanks to you, Taiki!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Me? Really?

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text:
No matter what happened, you kept your chin up
and met every setback head-on... You gave me
the drive to keep going!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well, of course! ♪ It's like I always say! Make
lemonade!

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text: Make... lemonade?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You know, when life gives you—well anyway, it
means you gotta seize the day!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: That's how I was brought up back on the farm!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Farms're so peaceful 'n' quiet! But depending on
the season and the weather, they can be kinda
rough.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
When it's freezin' cold or rainin' cats and dogs,
you can get stuck inside for ages. But does that
make it a bad day? Heck no!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Take sheep, for instance! They always look awful
cozy all bunched up together in the cold!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
And you can bet your behind my family always
had a blast cuttin' a rug and knittin' in front of the
fire on rainy days.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
If you keep focused on what's in front of you and
what you can do, every single day can be a lovely
one!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Point is, don't dwell on the past or worry about
the future. Think about the now! Seize the day!

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I get it! So the reason we were able to finish
today's shoot is because we were focusing on the
now...

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text:
That must've been what I saw in your smile, on the
day I offered you the part.

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking forward to another productive shoot
with you tomorrow! Let's do our best and make
that lemonade!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to shake up my routine with a walk one
day, when...

text_block_list.name: Director
text_block_list.text:
Okay, Taiki. For the next scene, I'd like you to try
and put some pathos into your lines!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Okay! I hear ya loud 'n' clear!
choice_data_list: Looks like things are going really well!
Looks like things are going really well!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh! You're the trainer from the party the other
day! Yessir! Things are goin' just swell here!
choice_data_list: You've got a knack for acting!
You've got a knack for acting!
Can I help out with anything?
Can I help out with anything?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh! You're the trainer from the party the other
day! Yes, ma'am! Things are goin' just swell here!
choice_data_list: You've got a knack for acting!
You've got a knack for acting!
Can I help out with anything?
Can I help out with anything?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! The director's been giving me loads of
pointers, so I reckon I'm getting much better!
Check this out!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
There are two types of Umamusume in this world,
my friend—those who dig for carrots, and those
who eat 'em!
choice_data_list:
Am I looking through a telescope? Because I
think I see a star!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! You've got an eye for talent! Wanna join
the crew? Makin' movies is loads of fun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I'm brought on board to do odd jobs
behind the scenes.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
There are two types of Umamusume in this world,
my friend—those who dig for carrots, and those
who feed 'em!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Daggummit! I fumbled the line!
But it's all good! Failure's just a steppin' stone to
success! I'll get it next time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, Taiki Shuttle manages to successfully
wrap up the day's shoot, and gets plenty of praise
from the crew.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You sure can! I think the director was lookin' for
an extra to play the cactus!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After some negotiation between Taiki Shuttle and
the director, I end up cast in a role as a human.
